_README: Plan 01-05 Task 4 — Alpaca paper round-trip cassette.
Recorded responses that emulate alpaca-py 0.43's return shapes for the
AlpacaBroker integration round-trip test. The test by default replays
from this file via unittest.mock.patch on the broker's underlying
Setting GEKKO_TEST_LIVE_ALPACA=1 (with real ALPACA_PAPER_* env vars)
switches the test into LIVE PAPER mode, which talks to the real
Alpaca paper API. Live mode is gated additionally on market hours
for the fill-stream test (off-hours filling cannot be observed).
The cassette ONLY contains paper-account-shaped responses — no live
data and no credentials. The 'paper-acct-CASSETTE' id is a placeholder.
